Package aim4.im.v2i.reservation

Class ReservationGridManager.Config

java.lang.Object
aim4.im.v2i.reservation.ReservationGridManager.Config
Enclosing class:
ReservationGridManager
public static class ReservationGridManager.Config extends Object
The configuration of the reservation grid manager.
